Snippet 2: Kymriah is a CAR-T therapy approved for use in children and young adults with relapsed or refractory B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (B-ALL). Common side effects of Kymriah include cytokine release syndrome (CRS), hypogammaglobulinemia, infections, and prolonged cytopenias. Neurological events, such as encephalopathy, can also occur.
